animal: Don a heavy armor — your beast-aspect won't allow it. Refuse to use the unarmed strike of your animal form.
dragon: Suffer an insult to your draconic majesty without retort or revenge.
fury: No formal anathema — Fury Instinct has no spiritual restrictions.
giant: Show fear in the face of larger foes. Refuse a worthy duel.
spirit: Allow undead to exist in your presence without attempting to disrupt or destroy them.
superstition: Willingly accept beneficial magic from another creature, including healing.
